headline: EOG Resources: American Oil Producer Pumping Excess Shareholder Rewards
summary: EOG Resources' low $50 WTI breakeven and limited hedging expose it to oil price upside, driving substantial FCF during ongoing volatility. See why EOG is a Buy.
